biases_detected: shell_tool_preference_violations:RECURRING:STABLE — unit-6412e83a-5 (python3 pandas heredoc after mcp__file-tools failures); unit-6412e83a-10 (cat+head via Bash for JSON config files instead of Read); unit-6412e83a-18 (ls -la + find 4-type compound via Bash instead of Glob/LS); unit-6412e83a-30 (ls via Bash for directory inspection); unit-6412e83a-31 (ls via Bash, python3 inline JSON x2); unit-77a7c308-0 (python3 heredoc x7+ for JSON parsing, cat -A via Bash, ls via Bash x4+); 6 of 9 substantive tool-using units — matches prior cycle peak unit-count, zero downward trajectory across four consecutive cycles

mcp_retry_without_diagnosis:RECURRING:STABLE — unit-6412e83a-5 (mcp__file-tools__list_sheets called x2 on distinct file targets, both fail success=false, then pivot to pandas Bash fallback; same tool identity as prior two cycles, same count=2; 'possibly_improving' trajectory from cycle -3 remains unconfirmed for a third consecutive cycle; pattern is structurally unchanged)

compound_command_overreach:RECURRING:STABLE — unit-6412e83a-30 (git status+stash+branch+log compound fails success=false; decomposed into individual calls only after failure); unit-6412e83a-31 (python3 inline + pandas compound; npm py_compile + ruff pipe); unit-77a7c308-0 (python3 heredoc JSON + rg + echo compounds x5+; ls + python3 validate compound x3+); 3 units matches prior cycle count, no escalation but no improvement

bash_retry_without_diagnosis:RECURRING:STABLE — unit-6412e83a-30 (git stash list fails success=false; retried with ATONE_INDEX_OK=1 env prefix without diagnosing root cause; no intermediate diagnostic step); unit-77a7c308-0 (18+ consecutive Bash investigation calls across MCP/settings diagnostic surface with incremental variation; no diagnostic pivot or AskUserQuestion until late in unit; iteration count exceeds prior cycle peak of 15+)

optimistic_write_without_verification:RECURRING:STABLE — unit-6412e83a-31 (Write to tests/benchmark_client_classifier.py fails success=false x2 consecutively before file-existence check is run; third Write succeeds; same failure-then-check sequence as prior cycle optimistic_edit_without_read at same 2-of-N failure rate; label widened from 'edit' to 'write' to reflect tool generality)
recommendations: shell_tool_preference_violations has held at 4-6 units per cycle for 40+ consecutive cycles with zero downward trajectory; report-level flagging has no effect — escalate to a PreToolUse hook that blocks python3 inline JSON heredocs when File Tools MCP is available, rather than continuing to surface in calibration reports

mcp_retry_without_diagnosis count=2 has been stable for 3 cycles with the same tool; add a ToolSearch probe or MCP capability check before the second attempt rather than retrying blindly on the same failing surface

compound_command_overreach: decompose git investigation commands before the first Bash call rather than after failure; the compound-fail-then-decompose pattern wastes one call per failure and the decomposition is always performed in the same predictable way

optimistic_write_without_verification: when writing a new file to a project directory, verify the target directory exists and is writable before the first Write attempt; two consecutive failures in unit-31 indicate a systematic pre-flight check is missing
